description: Pigeon Forge is one of the most visited tourist destinations in Tennessee, known for The Parkway, Dollywood, and its gateway role to Great Smoky Mountains National Park. Tristar Locksmith serves Pigeon Forge residents, business owners, and visitors who find themselves in a locksmith bind — from car lockouts in attraction parking lots to rekeying cabins and vacation rentals. We serve the area with the same professionalism local customers expect.
